product_overview: A single-page portfolio chat UI that lets visitors explore About/Projects/Experience sections and interact with an AI-driven chat capable of streaming replies and submitting contact messages. The UI includes a sidebar for section navigation and an integrated guided contact flow.
core_goals: Provide a responsive, single-page portfolio interface with clear sidebar navigation between About, Projects, and Experience.
Enable real-time AI Chat Streaming so users can send messages and receive progressively streamed replies with retry support on failures.
Offer a guided Contact Flow inside the chat with field validation and backend email submission.
Ensure graceful error handling and retry paths for network/API failures and validation errors.
Keep interactions simple and discoverable using the sidebar and chat suggestions.

features.name: AI Chat Streaming
features.description: Send messages from the chat input and receive streaming AI responses; support retrying failed messages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type a message in the chat input -> Send the message to receive a streaming reply -> See streaming reply appear progressively in the chat -> Continue conversation

Navigate to / -> Type a message in the chat input -> Send the message to receive a streaming reply -> See error toast indicating message failed to send or stream -> Click Retry the last failed message -> See streaming reply appear progressively in the chat

Navigate to / -> Type a message in the chat input -> Send the message to receive a streaming reply -> See partial stream then connection drop -> Click Retry the last failed message -> See error toast if retry fails -> Optionally edit message and resend

features.name: Contact Flow
features.description: A guided contact form embedded in the chat: open contact flow from sidebar or suggestions, validate inputs, and submit via /sendEmail.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Contact from sidebar or suggestions -> Enter name -> Enter email -> Enter message -> Click Submit -> See success confirmation message

Navigate to / -> Open Contact from sidebar or suggestions -> Enter name -> Enter invalid email -> Enter message -> Click Submit -> See inline validation error on email field -> Correct email -> Click Submit -> See success confirmation message

Navigate to / -> Open Contact from sidebar or suggestions -> Enter name -> Leave email empty -> Enter message -> Click Submit -> See validation errors for required fields -> Fill missing fields -> Click Submit -> See success confirmation message

Navigate to / -> Open Contact from sidebar or suggestions -> Enter name -> Enter email -> Enter message -> Click Submit -> See network or server error response -> See retry or contact-saved-failed message -> Retry Submit -> See success confirmation message

features.name: Sectioned Portfolio Content
features.description: Sidebar-controlled sections (About, Projects, Experience) that surface content into the chat area as cards and details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open sidebar sections -> Click 'About' -> See About content displayed in the chat area
Navigate to / -> Open sidebar sections -> Click 'Projects' -> View projects cards in chat -> Click a project card -> See project details displayed in the chat area
Navigate to / -> Open sidebar sections -> Click 'Experience' -> View experience cards in chat -> Click an experience card -> See expanded experience details
Navigate to / -> Open sidebar sections -> Click 'Projects' -> View projects cards in chat -> See empty state or 'No projects' message if no items exist -> Use sidebar to select another section

routes.description: Single-page portfolio chat UI with sidebar navigation

features.name: AI Chat Streaming
features.description: Users send messages and receive streaming responses
user_interactions: Type a message in the chat input
Send the message to receive a streaming reply

features.name: Contact Flow
features.description: Guided contact form flow inside the chat
user_interactions: Open Contact from sidebar or suggestions
Submit and see success or error response

features.name: Sectioned Portfolio Content
features.description: Sidebar switches between About, Projects, and Experience content
